changelog: Automatic in-app updates via electron-updater (download + install on confirmation)
Eliminated startup flicker; loading screen finishes twice as fast
Week now starts on Monday across calendar and date pickers
Local Orbitron font (no Google Fonts CDN, no FOUT)
Switched update version source to app.getVersion() (no hardcoded constants)
Hardened IPC validation and removed dead/unused dependencies
Inline modal notifications replace blocking alert() dialogs
